pageContext.name: Ash
pageContext.description: Gimme Some Sugar Baby!  Now you can add Ash from The Evil Dead to your Geeki Tikis® collection! The creative, colorful drinkware products combine some of the world's most-beloved Horror icons with our signature tiki-styling.  Each Geeki Tikis® mug features beautifully sculpted detailing true to the character it is paying homage to. Ash is crafted from high-quality ceramic, holds 18oz. of your favorite beverage and is top-shelf dishwasher safe and microwave safe.  Experience the aloha with every sip!
